hindi: जय भैरव बाबा, जय भैरव बाबा। काल भैरव महाकाल, भव दुख हर लाबा॥
english: Victory to Baba Bhairav, the great Kal Bhairav; remover of the sorrows of worldly existence
roman: Jai Bhairav Baba, Jai Bhairav Baba, Kaal Bhairav Mahakal Bhav Dukh Har Laba

hindi: काशी के कोतवाल, काल भैरव भारी। भैरव कुण्ड में नहाए, संकट सब टारी॥
english: Guardian of Kashi, the great Kal Bhairav; those who bathe in the Bhairav Kund have all troubles removed
roman: Kashi Ke Kotwal Kaal Bhairav Bhaari, Bhairav Kund Mein Nahaaye Sankat Sab Taari

hindi: भस्म रमाए अंग में, रुद्राक्ष की माला। श्याम वर्ण, भयंकर रूप, पर भक्तों पर उजाला॥
english: Body smeared with ash, wearing a rudraksha garland; dark-complexioned and fearsome in form, yet a light for devotees
roman: Bhasm Ramaye Ang Mein Rudraksh Ki Mala, Shyam Varn Bhayankar Roop Par Bhakton Par Ujala

hindi: जो कोई भैरव की आरती, नित्य नेम गावे। कालभैरव की कृपा से, मनोकामना पावे॥
english: Whoever sings Bhairav's aarti daily with devotion; by Kaal Bhairav's grace, all wishes are fulfilled
roman: Jo Koi Bhairav Ki Aarti Nitya Nem Gaave, Kaal Bhairav Ki Kripa Se Manokamna Paave

hindi: जय भैरव बाबा, जय भैरव बाबा॥
roman: Jai Bhairav Baba, Jai Bhairav Baba
